summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of SHariq Mukadam portfolio website. All major features tested and working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Placeholder avatar/silhouette image used instead of real photo

issues: Mobile nav menu covers full screen with white background, links are black on white - works fine but no red accent on mobile menu links

action_items: Optional: Replace placeholder hero profile image with a real photo
Optional: Footer copyright line uses data-testid='footer-copyright' but element not found - verify testid is present on the copyright paragraph
critical_code_review_comments: Contact form submission is MOCKED - simulated 1.2s delay, no real API call
Testimonials section uses a single dot (1 dot) suggesting carousel but only one set visible - data-testid='testimonial-set-0' only (no set-1 or set-2), 3 cards show in one row which is correct
Footer copyright testid missing - 'footer-copyright' data-testid was queried and returned null
mocked_apis: Contact form submission is MOCKED with 1.2s simulated delay and success message
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pure static HTML portfolio. All sections tested: Navbar (logo, 5 nav links, active state), Hero (HI I AM tag, SHariq red/Mukadam black, Hire Me/My Works buttons), Skills (6 cards with correct %, red SVG rings), CTA Banner, Works (6 cards, Design filter shows only proj-1 and proj-4), Certifications (6 cards, View Credential links), Testimonials (3 cards on black bg), Contact form (fills and submits with success message), Footer (4 columns, social icons), Mobile hamburger menu (shows full-screen nav), Smooth scroll (nav-skills click scrolls to y=1662). Contact form is MOCKED.
